creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
Source archive: https://git.xfce.org/panel-plugins/xfce4-hardware-monitor-plugin/snapshot/xfce4-hardware-monitor-plugin-1.5.0.tar.bz2

1. I save it into my user's downloads dir.
2. I open the file using xarchiver (via just a double click in Thunar).
3. I select 'src/Makefile.am' file and hit 'Extract' button, then 'Extract' button in the newly appeared window.

The window closes, nothing happens, the file is not extracted.
'View' button also doesn't work.
Dragging'n'dropping a file from archive into a dir opened in Thunar - also doesn't work.

xarchiver was built from ports, all options were included, GTK+ GUI toolkit support doesn't matter (I've tried both).
